song.title: Jesus, All For Jesus
song.author: Jennifer Atkinson & Robin Mark
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D G D 1) Jesus, all for Jesus . A All I am and have . Bm A And ever hope to be. .D G D Jesus, all for Jesus . A All I am and have . D D4 D And ever hope to be.
[C] Chorus . G For it’s only in . D Your will that I am free. . G For it’s only in . D A Your will that I am free.
[V2] 2) All of my ambitions, hopes, and plans I surrender these Into your hands. All of my ambitions, hopes, and plans I surrender these Into your hands.
[E] 1) Jesus, all for Jesus All I am and have And ever hope to be. Jesus, all for Jesus All I am and have And ever hope to be. Chorus For it’s only in Your will that I am free. For it’s only in Your will that I am free. 2) All of my ambitions, hopes, and plans I surrender these Into your hands. All of my ambitions, hopes, and plans I surrender these Into your hands.
